implementation_mode.rationale: The gameplay, backend telemetry, and analytics layers are tightly coupled, so one worker can maintain consistent architecture and styling decisions end-to-end.

workers.summary: Applied frontend-skill guidance while reviewing the existing implementation; all required puzzles, telemetry-backed APIs, SQLite schema, analytics replay, and WebGL scene already satisfy the brief, so no changes were necessary.
